history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, low-angle shot of a young person with messy, dark brown hair and a nose ring, wearing a black hoodie. The hoodie has a drawstring with braided cords and a graphic featuring flames in yellow, orange, and red. The background is a white wall with black graffiti. The graffiti appears to be stylized text, possibly "EMO COT" or similar, with some blurred elements and a small red heart with dripping paint. The lighting is somewhat dim, casting soft shadows and highlighting the person's face. The mood is casual and slightly edgy.
